title: Rally Caps
overview: A young baseball player has his dreams of pitching for a Little League travel team derailed by a devastating injury on the field.

trailers.title: Summer Camp Pranks | Have you ever been pranked?
Judd Hirsch is the perfect "Pop" | Does your grandpa come to all your games too?
Confidence builds character | Can we get an atta boy and some atta girls?
JAMES LOWE a.k.a "Coach Ballgame" | Atta Boy, Coach!
ESPN Announcer JOE BUCK, the Voice of Monday Night Football
Rally Caps Special Premiere Event | FIELD OF DREAMS on 8.31 for the 35th Anniversary Celebration!
